title: Bay Breeze Escape
subtitle: Kayak + Luxury Picnic
description: Take the kayaks out on Perdido Bay right in front of the house, then return to a fully styled luxury picnic setup. Includes comfortable pillows, blankets, a charcuterie board, and sparkling drinks.

title: Sunset & Bubbles
subtitle: Golden Hour Bayfront Setup
description: A fully styled coastal picnic timed perfectly for golden hour. Enjoy a charcuterie board, sparkling beverages, and a curated playlist while catching the cool breeze off the water.

title: The Explorer's Picnic
subtitle: Packable Luxury for the Beach
description: Planning a day trip to Pensacola Beach, Foley, or Orange Beach? We will pack a premium, insulated picnic basket with gourmet sandwiches, sides, drinks, and a large beach blanket ready for your adventure.

title: S'mores & Stories Night
subtitle: Firepit Experience Under the Stars
description: We handle the firepit setup with cozy seating. Includes a gourmet s'mores bar, hot cocoa, lantern lighting, and soft music for a perfect quiet night in.

title: Movie Night by the Bay
subtitle: Outdoor Cinema Setup
description: A private outdoor theater experience. We provide the large screen, projector, cozy lounge seating, blankets, popcorn, and a beverage station.

title: Grill & Chill
subtitle: Prepped Bayfront BBQ
description: Don't want to cook or shop? We fire up the grill, prep the sides, and provide your choice of premium meats or seafood to grill. Enjoy your meal on the hammock chairs with a stunning view.

title: Magnolia Morning
subtitle: Tea, Pastries & Peaceful Start
description: Retreat, relax, and reset. Wake up to a beautifully styled light breakfast setup under the trees with fresh pastries, tea service, and mindfulness journals.

title: The Milestone Celebration
subtitle: Birthdays & Anniversaries
description: A fully styled luxury picnic with a customized sign, specific decor theme, and premium desserts. Let us make your anniversary or birthday trip completely effortless.
